name: AI email categorizer with Gmail and Slack alerts
description: Lists recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to categorize each email by type and priority, saves the categorized results to Google Sheets, and posts a summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Advanced AI demo (presented at AI Developers #14 meetup)

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving categorized results

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the categorization summary

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to categorize (default 20)

categories.default: Work, Personal, Marketing, Notifications, Urgent, Spam
categories.description: Comma-separated list of email categories to use

steps.name: Build AI prompt for email categorization
Run Claude AI to categorize emails
Format categorized emails for Google Sheets
Save categorized emails to Google Sheets
